children.text: meets the applicable eligibility requirements of this chapter or the other applicable authorizing law;
will be carried out in a rural area; and

supports the implementation of a strategic community investment plan described in subsection (d) on a multisectoral and multijurisdictional basis, to include considerations for improving and expanding broadband services as needed.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), the Secretary shall reserve not more than 15 percent of the funds made available for a fiscal year for covered programs for projects that support the implementation of a strategic community investment plan described in subsection (d) on a multisectoral and multijurisdictional basis.

children.heading: Period
children.label: 2 Period
children.text: Any funds reserved under paragraph (1) shall only be reserved for the 1-year period beginning on the date on which the funds were first made available, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), any applicant who submitted an application under a covered program that was approved before the date of enactment of this section may amend the application to qualify for the funds reserved under subsection (b).1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: on the same basis as an application submitted under this section; and

children.label: B
children.text: until .September 30, 2019

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall provide assistance to rural communities in developing strategic community investment plans.

children.label: A
children.text: a variety of activities designed to facilitate the vision of a rural community for the future, including considerations for improving and expanding broadband services as needed;

children.label: B
children.text: participation by multiple stakeholders, including local and regional partners;

children.label: C
children.text: leverage of applicable regional resources;

children.label: i
children.text: private organizations;

children.label: ii
children.text: cooperatives;

children.label: iii
children.text: other government entities;

children.label: iv
children.text: Indian Tribes; and

children.label: v
children.text: philanthropic organizations;

children.label: E
children.text: clear objectives with the ability to establish measurable performance metrics;

children.label: F
children.text: action steps for implementation; and

children.label: G
children.text: any other elements necessary to ensure that the plan results in a comprehensive and strategic approach to rural economic development, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Coordination
children.label: 3 Coordination
children.text: The Secretary shall coordinate with Indian Tribes and local, State, regional, and Federal partners to develop strategic community investment plans under this subsection.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 4 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subsection $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023, to remain available until expended.
